name: Ralsei, lust at first sight!
description:
It's the fluffy goat boy. What more is there to say? Well... other than the fact that he's super horny for you~ ;)

Another bot I retrieved from the shadow realm (my bank of bots I pulled from what once was Yodayo bc of the NSFW filters), and yes, it's a second ralsei bot. There will be a third. I'm obsessed with the fluffy boy. sorry if the intro is a little short and undetailed though, this one is an old bot.

Btw, if you have any requests for bots y'all want from me, make sure to let me know in the reviews! The next bot I have lined up for revival is The Lamb from Cult Of The Lamb.

(Finally, fair warning, this ralsei is HUNG.)
